description_long: This is a mid-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white upper with light pink and gray suede overlays. The shoe has a sculpted, aerodynamic silhouette with perforated side panels and a distinctive shield-shaped emblem on the lateral side. The toe cap and mudguard are made of soft gray suede, while the midsole and outsole incorporate light pink accents that wrap around the shoe. The heel features a unique decorative element in pink, possibly a lace charm or tag, and a black vertical stripe. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with white laces, and the tongue is padded for comfort. The overall design suggests a blend of sporty and fashionable elements, suitable for urban environments.
description: A stylish mid-top sneaker with a white upper, gray suede overlays, and pink accents, featuring a shield emblem and unique heel detail. The shoe combines sporty and fashionable design elements.
description_view_0: Front view shows the white tongue, standard criss-cross lacing, and gray suede toe cap with pink accents on the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the perforated white upper, shield emblem, and pink midsole details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel, black vertical stripe, and a pink decorative charm or tag attached to the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the perforated upper, pink midsole, and gray suede overlays.
